name: Kaspar's Chocolate Raspberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch bundt pan and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the softened butter, sour cream, eggs, vanilla, and raspberry puree to the dry ingredients.
5. Beat the mixture for about 4 minutes on medium speed until well combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean (the cake may be slightly sticky in the center).
7. Allow the cake to cool on a rack for at least 15 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Serve the cake with raspberry sauce or fresh raspberries and mint.
